name: Element Indoor Golf - Vadnais Heights
address: 4255 White Bear Pkwy Suite 2100, Vadnais Heights, MN 55110
about: Element Indoor Golf offers a premier indoor golf experience with high-end simulator technology, dining, and event hosting capabilities. The venue features Golfzon simulators, recognized as the best on the market, and provides a casual environment where golfers can play, eat, and drink. Reservations are booked by the hour per bay, and pricing varies based on peak and off-peak times, with discounts available for seniors, veterans, and league players. The facility hosts leagues, corporate events, and private parties, making it suitable for both serious golfers and casual groups.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Golfzon simulator technology recognized by Golf Digest
Comprehensive food and beverage options including full bar and appetizers
Flexible booking options with hourly and membership plans
Active leagues and events for competitive and social play
Spacious VIP suites for group outings

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen with appetizers and food options available
Full bar with domestic bottles, taps, and wine options; BOGO deals available

simulator_hardware.notes: Top-rated simulator technology used at the facility

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you should bring your own clubs to use the simulators. The venue does not mention club rentals.

faq.question: Can I bring outside food or drink?
faq.answer: The venue has a full kitchen and bar, so outside food and drink policies are not specified. It is recommended to enjoy their in-house options.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Typically, 1 person takes 1 hour to finish 18 holes, while 4 people average 4 hours to complete 18 holes.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue welcomes families and offers youth golf programs, making it suitable for kids.
